title: Show app pricing for non-admins
excerpt:
It would be great if an app’s pricing were visible to non-admin roles. Currently, it’s hidden.A user can just request an admin to add an app, but they don’t see the pricing for it. 
I’m requesting this because one of my …

posts.author: PluginGenie (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be great if an app’s pricing were visible to non-admin roles. Currently, it’s hidden.A user can just request an admin to add an app, but they don’t see the pricing for it.

I’m requesting this because one of my potential customers had a hard time trying to find the price of the app I created, because they weren’t an admin.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for the request @PluginGenie !

posts.author: PluginGenie (Oliver Albrecht)
posts.cookedHtml: In another community thread, I was made aware that the reason this is the case is to make it more likely for non-admins to request admins to install an app. I believe this was mentioned in the developers-only community. I’m fine with that reasoning. It helps admins learn more about what apps non-admins are interested in.
